channel.title: Posts on Neeraj Adhav
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Neeraj Adhav

item.title: Corrosion Science 2
item.description: Corrosion Science 2 Jul 13, 2021 - CHEM SPPU FE Factors Influencing Corrosion The rate and extent of corrosion depend on the following Nature of the metal Nature of the corroding environment. Nature of the metal Corrosion rate depends on the properties of the metal Position in the galvanic series: When two metals or alloys are in contact in the presence of an electrolyte, the metal that is higher in the galvanic series undergoes corrosion.

item.title: Corrosion Science 1
item.description: Introduction Definition Types of Corrosion: Chemical Corrosion or Dry Corrosion Pilling Bedworth ratio Electrochemical Corrosion or wet corrosion Galvanic Corrosion Concentration cell corrosion Introduction Corrosion is a ‘billion’ dollar thief’. Even though it is a natural phenomenon in which the gases, moisture and other chemicals present in the atmosphere react chemically with metals to convert them into their salts, it results in loss of material and money.
